title: Twinseed
description: Push seed baskets (S) onto garden plots (G) by walking into them — baskets slide one cell in your direction. When a basket reaches a plot they pair up and both disappear. Solid tiles (rock R, wood W, metal crate M) block movement; rock breaks with a pickaxe (P), wood burns with a torch (T). Ice (I) is slippery — you and pushable items slide until they hit something solid. Water (≈) is walkable but seed baskets pushed into it drown; pushing a metal crate into water creates a walkable platform. The clone action drops a ghostly twin (~) at your current position; clone again to teleport back to it — useful when a path becomes blocked.
